Plan for sample S103 culturing,

Cell count:

total:

live:

viability:

size:

Total cell count: 1.835e6 / ml in 5 mL = 9.175e6

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 24 wells x 50 µl x = 1200 µl

2000 cells/µl = 2.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 600 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 654 µl

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 84.6 µl

aprotinin → 1.8 µl

thrombin → 1.8 µl

fibrinogen → 12 µl

B) Organoids for flow and IF:

12 wells x 50 µl = 600 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 1.20E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 600 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 654 µl

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 84.6 µl

aprotinin → 1.8 µl

thrombin → 1.8 µl

fibrinogen → 12 µl

Sample ID: S103_pPer

total:

live:

viability:

size:

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer = 1 730 µl (=3.175e5 cells)

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 2.4e6 cells per 2 mL stemcell banker

= 1 308 µl

Altogether:

Medium needed 350 uL x 36 = 12.6 mL

3x 654 uL= 14.562 mL ~ 15 mL

Omegel needed = 253.8 uL

aprotinin = 5.4 uL

thrombin = 5.4 uL

fibrinogen = 36 uL

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
